assert_return ge_u v128:80818283fdfeff000001027f80fdfeff v128:80818283fdfeff000001027f80fdfeff -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:80ff80ff0000000001000100ff00ff00 v128:808080800000000001010101ffffffff -> v128:ffffffffffffffff0000000000000000
assert_return ge_u v128:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa v128:55555555555555555555555555555555 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:80818283fdfeff000001027f80fdfeff v128:80818283fdfeff000001027f80fdfeff -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:ffffffff000000000100010000800080 v128:80ffffff0000000001000000ff000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:55555555555555555555555555555555 v128:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return ge_u v128:39303930393039303930393039303930 v128:39303930393039303930393039303930 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return ge_u v128:34123412341234123412341234123412 v128:34123412341234123412341234123412 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
